title: Watch live as President Trump hosts news conference on Iran war
shortDescription: President Trump will host a news conference to address the intense search-and-rescue effort following the crash of an F-15E Strike Eagle fighter.

title: See the best photos from the White House Easter Egg Roll
shortDescription: Children and families gather on the South Lawn for the annual White House Easter Egg Roll, a springtime tradition filled with games and color.

title: Trump called Iranians 'animals' at Easter event
shortDescription: President Donald Trump said Iran’s proposal for a ceasefire was “significant” but “not good enough."

title: Supreme Court clears way for Trump DOJ to wipe out Steve Bannon's conviction
shortDescription: Bannon, now a host of a popular MAGA podcast, was convicted in 2022 for defying a subpoena from the House committee that investigated the Jan. 6, 2021 attack .

title: What’s new at the White House Easter egg roll? 150 live chicks
shortDescription: The White House Easter egg roll is back Monday with 40,000 eggs, live chicks and a patriotic theme. Here’s how to watch.

title: Daily Briefing: Trump's profanity-filled Easter post
shortDescription: President gives Iran until Tuesday to reopen Strait of Hormuz. Here is the news to know on Monday.

title: Iran rejects new ceasefire proposal as Trump's deadline nears
shortDescription: A spokesperson for Iran's military said his country will retaliate if President Donald Trump carries out his threat to strike Iranian infrastructure.

title: Two elections on tap this week. One has impacts on the US House.
shortDescription: A special election for the US House and a state Supreme Court race on Tuesday, April 7.

title: Gubernatorial candidate Chad Bianco is claiming election fraud | The Excerpt
shortDescription: California’s Prop 50 passed overwhelmingly in 2025, giving Democrats the ok to redistrict. Republican Sheriff Bianco is challenging the result.

title: Trump's mail-in ballot EO could be 'a logistical nightmare.' Here's why.
shortDescription: Elections experts tell USA TODAY it would take years, not months, to create even a basic national mail-in system. Trump wants it for the midterms.

title: Officials feared trap after F-15 shot down. Trump says Iran 'got lucky'
shortDescription: The president said in an interview with Axios that the crew member used a phrase that was "something a Muslim would say."

title: Trump says US will strike Iranian infrastructure
shortDescription: Trump told Iran that the US will strike their country's infrastructure after weeks of threats that Iran reopen the Strait of Hormuz or face attacks.

title: Trump tells Iran to open Strait of Hormuz 'or you'll be living in Hell'
shortDescription: President Donald Trump took to social media on Easter Sunday to issue an expletive-laden threat against Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Trump to Iran: ’48 hours before all Hell will reign down’
shortDescription: President Trump posted on Truth Social that "time is running out" for Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, saying that "all Hell will reign down."

title: Trump proposes privatizing TSA screening operations
shortDescription: President Donald Trump proposed to begin privatizing airport security operations handled by the Transportation Security Administration, in an effort to save money.

title: Trump: 'We got him!' as US forces rescue crew member missing in Iran
shortDescription: An intense search mission resulted in the safe rescue of a missing crew member of a downed F-15E jet, President Donald Trump said early Sunday.

title: Trump proposes to begin privatizing TSA screening operations
shortDescription: TSA has about 50,000 federal employees who handle screening at nearly all U.S. airports.

title: Will gas prices influence 2026 elections? Democrats hope so
shortDescription: Democratic candidates are noting that President Donald Trump's war with Iran caused prices gas prices to skyrocket. Voters may be listening.

title: Can this Trump ally's twin make history and replace him in Congress?
shortDescription: Trever Nehls could replace his twin brother Rep. Troy Nehls, a loyalist to President Donald Trump. Can the MAGA heir apparent make history?

title: The woman who thinks hot Democrats will make the party cool again
shortDescription: A Democratic strategist started a social media account about her party running hot people as a joke. Now she's serious.

title: Trump orders pay and benefits for DHS workers during shutdown
shortDescription: More than 35,000 federal workers have gone without paychecks during the seven-week-long partial government shutdown, the longest in US history.

title: What will voting look like in midterms? New suit challenges Trump order
shortDescription: A coalition of Democrat-led states filed yet another court challenge to President Donald Trump's executive order restricting mail-in voting.

title: Trump requests $152M to turn Alcatraz into 'state-of-the-art' prison
shortDescription: The president proposes turning Alcatraz Island into a 'state-of-the-art' prison facility.

title: Trump says US 'can't take care of daycare'
shortDescription: President Donald Trump said his administration could not take care of daycare costs as it was “fighting wars,” placing the responsibility on states instead.

title: California challenges Trump's 'unconstitutional' mail-in ballot order
shortDescription: California Attorney General Rob Bonta said Trump's order is a 'desperate attempt' to change the outcome of the 2026 midterm elections.
